title: Crypto Bridge - Open deBridge App
meta_description: crypto bridge access for cross-chain swaps and transfers via deBridge. Connect wallet, review the route, and open the official app.
hero_h2: Move assets between chains in the official app
hero_lead: Crypto Bridge routes users to deBridge for non-custodial cross-chain swaps, token transfers, and onchain execution across supported networks.
what_is: deBridge is a non-custodial execution layer for same-chain and cross-chain actions; its official docs describe 0-TVL execution, DLN settlement, messaging, and recovery paths for unfulfilled orders.

how.d: Use the primary CTA to open app.debridge.com and connect the wallet you intend to send from.
Select the source chain, source token, destination chain, destination token, and recipient wallet.
Check the expected output, network, token, route details, fees, limits, and recovery terms before signing.
Approve only the required wallet prompts, then monitor the order in the app or deExplorer.

points.p: The page sends visitors directly to app.debridge.com, the official deBridge trading interface for cross-chain swaps and transfers.
deBridge coordinates outcomes through its Liquidity Network, where solvers provide liquidity on demand instead of relying on shared bridge pools.
The supported chains docs list Ethereum, Solana, Arbitrum, Avalanche, BNB Chain, Polygon, Optimism, Base, Linea, and more.

faq.a: A crypto bridge lets users move assets or execute outcomes across blockchain networks; ethereum.org gives a neutral overview of bridge models and risks.

faq.q: Is this crypto bridge the official deBridge app?
faq.a: No. This is an independent landing page that routes to the official app at app.debridge.com; verify the domain before connecting a wallet.

faq.q: Which networks can this crypto bridge reach through deBridge?
faq.a: deBridge docs list support across EVM chains and Solana, including Ethereum, Arbitrum, Avalanche, BNB Chain, Polygon, Optimism, Base, Linea, TRON, Injective, and others; availability can vary by product and token.

faq.q: Does a crypto bridge custody my funds?
faq.a: deBridge describes its model as non-custodial and 0-TVL: funds pass through smart contracts per order, and unfulfilled orders can be cancelled and reclaimed under the documented flow.

faq.q: What should I check before using a crypto bridge?
faq.a: Confirm the official domain, token addresses, source and destination networks, recipient wallet, quoted output, fees, route status, and cancellation terms before signing.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify app.debridge.com before connecting a wallet. Educational content only, not financial advice.
